description.from: Attacks enemies in a straight line to deal ??? M.DMG, reducing their ATK by 15% and increasing M.DMG they take by 25% for 10 sec. If the skill is used during [Overcharge] state, deals ??? additional M.DMG to the enemies, additionally reduces their ATK by 15%, and additionally increases M.DMG they take by 25%.
description.to:
Deals 299*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 189.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, reducing ATK by 10% for 5sec and increasing M.DMG taken by 25%.

[Overcharge]: Deals an additional 299*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 189.1% of ATK M.DMG, and additionally increases the ATK reduction by 10% and the M.DMG taken increase by 25%.

description.from: Dispels negative effects of all allies and heals their HP by ??? for 10 sec, increasing CC Resist by 250. If the Skill is used during [Overcharge] state, increases all allies' Crit Chance by 250 and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 10% and grants immunity to CC.
description.to:
Removes all negative effects from all allies, restores 124*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 20.1% of ATK HP 10 times, and increases Status Resistance by 300.

[Overcharge]: Additionally increases all allies’ Crit Chance by 250, DMG dealt to non-Hero enemies by 12%, and Status Resistance by 300.

description.from: Explodes an energy orb to a random target and nearby enemies in range, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG. If the Skill is used during [Overcharge] state, deals ??? M.DMG, increasing M.DMG enemies take by 25% for 10 sec, and inflicts Stun for 5 sec when the energy orb explodes.
description.to:
Detonates an energy orb on a random enemy and nearby enemies, dealing 139*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 87.7% of ATK M.DMG.

[Overcharge]: Deals an additional 57.5% of ATK M.DMG 6 time(s), increases M.DMG taken by 10% for 10sec, and stuns for 3sec.

description.from: Gains 1 stack of [Charge] every 0.5 sec, and gains 10 stacks of [Charge] per 1 orb of Mana consumbed. Upon reaching 100 [Charge] stacks, enters [Overcharge] state, increasing ATK by ??? + 5% of Annette's ATK and reducing Cooldown of all Skills by 10% upon normal attack for 15 sec. All effects are irremovable, and Annette cannot gain any [Charge] stacks during [Overcharge] state.
description.to:
Gains 1 [Charge] every 0.5sec, and gains 10 [Charge] whenever 1000 Mana is consumed.
When [Charge] reaches 100 stacks, enters [Overcharge] for 15sec, empowering Skills.

[Overcharge]: Increases ATK by 210*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 5% of Annette’s ATK, and on Normal Attack, reduces cooldown of all Skills by 5%. This effect cannot be dispelled, and [Charge] cannot be gained while [Overcharge] is active.

light.from: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.
light.to: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.

dark.to: Upon use, the amount of [Charge] gained is increased by 40%.

light.from: Applies the ATK Boost effect to all allies.
light.to: [Overcharge] Attack increase amount is increased by 100%.

description.from: [Ray of Annihilation] For 10 sec, reduces the target's Crit Chance by 250 and the target's Mana by {0}.
description.to: [Ray of Annihilation] For 10 sec, reduces the target's Crit Chance by 150 and Mana by {0}.

description.from: [Emergency Treatment] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases heal rate by {0}%,
description.to: [Emergency Treatment] Reduces Mana Cost by 1000 and increases Heal Rate by {0}%.

description.from: [Process of Elimination] DMG is increased by {0}% and upon ATK, gains 2 stack of Charge. This stack can be gained while in Overcharge state.
description.to: [Process of Elimination] Increases DMG by {0}%, and on attack, gains 2 additional Charge stacks. These stacks can also be gained during Overcharge.

description.from: [Charge] Gains {0} stacks of Charge at the beginning of every battle. While in Overcharge, Normal attacks increase Cooldown Reduction by 5%.
description.to: [Charge] At the start of battle, gains {0} Charge Stacks, and while in Overcharge, increases Cooldown Reduction from Normal Attacks by 10%.

description.from: Gains 1 stack of Charge every {0} sec, and recovers Mana by 1%. Charge stacks can also be gained during [Overcharge] state. Additionally, increases all allies' DMG dealt to Bosses by {1}% and reduces DMG all allies take by {2}% for the duration of [Overcharge]. This effect is multiplied by 2 for the ally with the highest ATK.
description.to: Every {0}sec, gains 1, Charge(s) and recovers 1% Mana. This Charge can be gained even while Overcharge is active. During [Overcharge], all allies' damage dealt to bosses increases by {1}%, and damage taken is reduced by {2}%.

description.from: Summons the soul of Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal, recovering Mana of all allies by 300 every sec for 15 sec. Afterward, enters [Overcharge] state, increasing M.DMG all enemies take by 30% for the duration. If the target is a Boss, changes the DMG Boost effect to 60%.
description.to: Summons the soul of Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal for 15sec, recovering 225 Mana for all allies every sec, and enters the [Overcharge] state. During the duration, increases M.DMG all enemies take by 6%, and against Bosses, the effect is changed to 60%.

1.from: Increases all allies' ATK by 30% and Crit DMG by 50% for the duration of Skill.
1.to: For the duration, increases ATK of all allies by 11%.

2.from: Reduces Skill Activation Requirements by 5 sec. Additionally, reduces all allies' Cooldown of all Skills by 0.5 sec every sec.
2.to: Every sec, reduces cooldown of all allies’ skills by 0.125 sec.
